content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the milestone bundle rendering/persistence changes and ran targeted `milestone_record` and CLI tests. I found two issues: legacy explicit bead IDs that happen to match canonical numbering are misclassified during CLI backfill, and canonical `plan.json` no longer validates duplicate titles across implicit beads even though downstream bead resolution still depends on title fallback for those entries.

## Amendments

1. Treat legacy `plan.json` entries with a populated `bead_id` as explicit when backfilling `explicit_id`, instead of classifying `bead-1` / `ms-*.bead-1` as implicit-slot matches. In `src/cli/project.rs:586-605`, `backfill_legacy_explicit_bead_flags` leaves slot-matching IDs unset, and `src/cli/project.rs:846-862` then refuses ID-based matching unless `explicit_id == Some(true)`. Pre-upgrade plans never auto-filled implicit `bead_id`s, so an older planner-authored `bead_id: "bead-1"` or `"ms-alpha.bead-1"` is currently downgraded to title fallback only; once the live bead title drifts, `project create-from-bead` silently loses flow overrides and membership confirmation for a still-stable explicit bead. Add a regression test that loads a legacy plan with `bead_id: "bead-1"`, no `explicit_id`, and a renamed live bead title.
   Rationale: This breaks the explicit compatibility goal for existing milestone bundles and can mis-resolve real legacy beads.
2. Reintroduce duplicate-title validation for implicit beads after canonicalization. `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs:150-170` only rejects duplicate titles when `bead_id` is `None`, but `render_plan_json` now canonicalizes every implicit bead to have a `bead_id` plus `explicit_id: false` via `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs:568-593`. That means a human-edited `plan.json` can contain two implicit beads with the same title and still pass `validate()`, even though `resolve_bead_plan` relies on title fallback for implicit beads and becomes ambiguous / errors in `src/cli/project.rs:827-842` and `src/cli/project.rs:864-879`. Validation should reject duplicate titles for all non-explicit beads, not just raw `bead_id == None` inputs.
   Rationale: `plan.json` is supposed to be an authoritative human-editable artifact; accepting an internally ambiguous implicit-bead mapping is a downstream correctness risk.
